---
title: "Triple-A Watch"
description: "A compact Triple-A prospect-age and standout performance desk."
---

::: {.page-intro}
<span class="eyebrow">The next level down</span>

# Who is forcing the next question in Triple-A?

The Triple-A watch is a small reporting board for young players and unusual production. It surfaces leads without pretending a public stat line is a complete scouting report.
:::

{{< include includes/aaa-watch.html >}}
